CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Mar-18-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Richard Strombert, Esq. for Plaintiff: Brodhead Steel Products Co.
Plainitff's Witness David Brodhead, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Shamrock Structures, Inc. and Banya 2000 LLC, as follows:
Balance on the Principal $3,796.89
(Prejudgment Interest $323.60)
Attorney's Fees $6,792.50
Costs $350.00, for a total of $11,262.99
Judgment against the Defaulted Defendant: Banya 2000 LLC, for the Mechanic's Lien described in the complaint and costs of recording fee of $18.00.
See scanned doc for details of the Judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.
